name: team_config_good
note: A layered configuration. The house-style must-hold keeps the path-scoped rule as a guide and adds a PostToolUse hook that governs both create and edit, with a pre-commit check as a backstop. The no-secrets must-hold is governed at its binding event by a pre-commit check and a CI gate. The preference is guided by a rule, not governed by a blocking control. Every must-hold convention is governed on its binding events, and the preference is guided in the right layer.

conventions.name: house_style_no_em_dash
conventions.description: Markdown files must not contain em-dashes.
